hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(^|/)\.env$' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Blocking .env edit — update env_example.txt instead and apply changes to .env manually to avoid exposing credentials."}' || true
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qi '\.py$' && command -v black > /dev/null 2>&1 && black "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && isort "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; true
